title: Fix misc stuff found by jhonce
body:
During the python client implementation, jhonce found some return types
that needed correction as well as a panic related to history which is now
corrected.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: I love how 2 lines of change in the varlink definition turn into 980 lines of diff in generated code. Just lovely, really.

:pushpin: Commit c9544e2 has been approved by `rhatdan`
